title: Live Delivery Tracker
subtitle: Real-time GPS positioning + nearest insurance risk zone overlay
permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Please allow access in browser settings.
positionUnavailable: Position unavailable. Check your device GPS.
timeout: Location request timed out. Try again.
mapLegendHint: Colored zones = insurance risk areas · Blue dot = you
startTrackingPrompt: Start tracking to see your live position on the map
browserPermission: Your browser will ask for location permission — click Allow
legendNote: Risk zones are updated based on historical weather, AQI, and flood data across major Indian cities. Click any zone on the map for details.
